strengths: Strong Power BI and dashboard development
Practical SQL and ETL pipeline experience
Advanced Excel and data cleaning skills
weaknesses: No stated experience with UAC Portal
Limited mention of Access, PowerPoint, Outlook
improvement_bullets: Collaborated with cross-functional teams to conduct program evaluation and performance analysis, utilizing MS Office (Excel, Access, PowerPoint) to track outcomes and identify trends in service effectiveness.
Drafted and maintained comprehensive SOPs and policy documentation, ensuring organizational compliance and alignment with non-profit sector reporting standards.
Managed incident databases and internal reporting workflows using MS Access and Excel, ensuring accurate documentation of program metrics for executive review.
Conducted quantitative and qualitative analysis on diverse datasets to support immigrant and family-focused service initiatives, effectively translating findings into actionable program improvements.
Leveraged advanced analytical tools to support data-driven decision-making, with a strong commitment to improving outcomes for the children and families served by the agency.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Bilingual Program Analyst (English / Spanish) opportunity with HeartShare. I am interested in this opportunity because of HeartShare's century-long legacy of empowering individuals and families in New York City, and I am deeply motivated by your commitment to providing essential support to children and immigrant communities. What interests me about working for HeartShare is its holistic approach to program accountability and data-driven service improvement; it excites me because I am passionate about using technical insights to foster social impact. I believe my background in data infrastructure and my experience in cross-functional program analysis would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by translating complex data into clear, operational strategies. In fact, while at Shine Masters, I developed interactive Power BI dashboards and automated intake workflows that reduced data processing time by 40% and directly increased customer acquisition by 300%. By implementing these structured data pipelines, I enabled our leadership to move away from manual reporting and toward real-time, data-driven decision-making. Ultimately, I know that the Bilingual Program Analyst role at HeartShare would allow me to bring my quantitative expertise to improve the quality and effectiveness of your programs. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst at Shine Masters enabled me to develop my technical documentation and SOP development skills. I took ownership of our operational documentation, which reduced new hire onboarding time by 50% and ensured consistent service delivery across our team. I am excited by the opportunity to use my data mining and visualization skills in working on the reporting and performance tracking tasks at HeartShare. I know that my proficiency in SQL, Python, and the Microsoft Office suite—including Access and Excel—aligns with what it takes to succeed at the Bilingual Program Analyst role. I would love the opportunity to discuss how my analytical skills and dedication to social services can support the Department of Data Analysis and Accountability. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
